commit_message:
Added long running commands runtime to log files. Added long running commands runtime to log files. Added logging of the runtime and peak memory for the following commands:

- `global_place`
- `rtl_macro_placer` 
- `repair_design`
- `repair_timing`
- `global_route`
- `detailed_route`

Updated the regression tests diff checking to ignore runtime lines.
